GetDnsResolverRuleList.marker: The starting position for batch list query, a system-generated string
GetDnsResolverRuleList.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 100
GetDnsResolverRuleList.status: Status of the forwarding rule: BOUND: associated with VPC; UNBOUND: not associated with VPC; BINGDING: associating; UNBINGDING: disassociating. If not specified, all forwarding rules are returned; if specified, only rules in the given status are returned
